text: Here, I find myself at the intersection of creativity and science. The glass walls and neon glow evoke curiosity, and the open, ordered space allows my thoughts to wander freely. Inside, confronted by the vivid R+D wall and the artifacts of innovation, I am struck by the precarious nature of perception and knowledge—how simple it is to misconstrue what is before us, as the writing points out. I feel intellectually stimulated, but also humble, reminded that clarity is as fragile as it is desirable.
